sections.paragraph:
Original: מרב

Transliteration: mêrâb

Phonetic: may-rawb'

BDB Definition:

Merab = "increase"
  1. the eldest daughter of king Saul; promised to David but given instead to Adriel the Meholathite; mother of 5 children

Origin: from H7231

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
